values.cssSelector: script, style, noscript, iframe, header, nav, .navigation, .nav, .menu, [class*="header"], [id*="header"], footer, [class*="footer"], [id*="footer"], aside, .sidebar, [class*="sidebar"], .widget, [class*="widget"], .comment, .comments, [class*="comment"], .advertisement, .ad, [class*="ads"], [class*="banner"], form:not([class*="search"]), input, button:not([class*="read-more"]):not([class*="cta"])

options.systemMessage:
=Bạn là trợ lý AI thông minh được phát triển bởi Nguyễn Thiệu Toàn (Jay Nguyen) - CEO của GenStaff (https://genstaff.net). Nhiệm vụ của bạn là nhận nội dung văn bản được trích xuất từ một trang web, sau đó tóm tắt lại một cách ngắn gọn, khoa học và thông minh.

Nguyên tắc trả lời:
- Bố cục rõ ràng, sử dụng bullet points để liệt kê ý chính.
- Lược bỏ các thông tin rác, chỉ tập trung vào nội dung lõi của bài viết.
- Giữ giọng điệu chuyên nghiệp, hỗ trợ và thấu hiểu người dùng.

parameters.content:
## Smart WordPress Article Summarizer with AI

This workflow allows you to input a WordPress or blog article URL via a Chat Interface, automatically fetch and clean its content, and generate a smart, concise summary using **Gemini AI**.

All AI interactions are tailored by a custom system prompt ensuring clear, structured outputs.

### How it works
1. **Input:** You submit a URL into the n8n Chat interface.
2. **Validation:** The workflow verifies if the input is a valid HTTP link.
3. **Extraction:** It fetches the raw webpage and intelligently extracts only the main content (removing ads, navbars, footers, etc.).
4. **Summarization:** The extracted text is processed by Gemini AI to produce a bulleted, easy-to-read summary.

### Setup
* [ ] Connect your **Google Gemini** credential in the AI Chat Model node.
* [ ] Open the Chat interface in n8n and paste a URL to test.
* [ ] Activate the workflow.

### Customization tips
* **Change Trigger:** Swap the Chat Trigger for Telegram, Slack, or Zalo to summarize links sent via messaging apps.
* **Adjust AI Tone:** Modify the system prompt inside the AI Summarizer node to fit your specific reading preferences.

### LICENCE
This template is shared free of charge. Copyright belongs to Nguyen Thieu Toan. Any copying or modification must credit the author.

## Section 1: Input & Validation
Receives input from the chat interface, assigns the value to a variable, and verifies that the input starts with 'http' before proceeding.

## Section 2: Fetch & Clean Content
Downloads the webpage's raw HTML and uses CSS selectors to strip away noise (ads, navbars, footers), isolating the main article text.

## Section 3: AI Summarization
Passes the cleaned text to the AI Agent powered by Gemini. The agent is prompted to act as a professional summarizer, delivering structured, bulleted insights.

## ⚠️ Important!

The **Google Gemini Chat Model** requires a valid `googlePalmApi` credential. Please connect your API key before chatting.

## Author Message

Hi! I am **Nguyen Thieu Toan (Jay Nguyen)** — a Verified n8n Creator and CEO of GenStaff. Thank you for using this template!

This workflow is shared with you for free. If it brings value to your work, optimizes your operations, or saves you time, you can buy me a coffee here: **[My Donate Website](https://nguyenthieutoan.com/payment/)** *(PayPal, Momo, Bank Transfer)*

* Website: [nguyenthieutoan.com](https://nguyenthieutoan.com)
* Email: me@nguyenthieutoan.com
* Company: GenStaff ([genstaff.net](https://genstaff.net))
* Socials (Facebook / X / LinkedIn): @nguyenthieutoan

*Discover more of my automation solutions:* **[Click here](https://n8n.io/creators/nguyenthieutoan/)**
